title: Aadhi Bhagavan Rap Song Lyrics

seo.title: Aadhi Bhagavan Rap Song Lyrics

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the Aadhi Bhagavan Rap Song?

The song embodies a sense of confidence and bravado, reflecting the character's journey in the movie.

Who are the lead actors in Aadhi Bhagavan?

The lead actor is Jayam Ravi and the lead actress is Neetu Chandra.

Who composed the music for Aadhi Bhagavan?

The music for the film was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the Aadhi Bhagavan Rap Song released?

The song was released on October 7, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aadhi Bhagavan Rap Song Lyrics features the powerful vocals of Jayam Ravi and Neetu Chandra, released in 2013. It captures the essence of energy and confidence, resonating with the film's themes of strength and determination. The upbeat tempo and engaging lyrics evoke a sense of excitement, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations and parties. This track stands out as a testament to Yuvan's musical prowess and the dynamic performances of the artists.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aadhi Bhagavan Rap Song from the movie Aadhi Bhagavan is a high-energy track composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja. Featuring powerful vocals by Sathyan and The Praphecy, this song delivers an intense and motivational vibe. Its unique rap style and dynamic beats make it a standout piece in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: I am going to kill you, you know who I am.
Come test me, I am going to shoot you.
Let's go, I am the king of the jungle. You think I am joking, but I am a legend. Anyone looking for me should know I am serious. My bullets are ready, and I am prepared to fight.
I am skilled in killing and defeating anyone. If you enter my territory, you won't leave. I will destroy anything that gets in my way.
I am a psycho and an animal, focused on money. I have no time for love because I am all about making money.
I am a hustler, a gangster. I take out everyone except the banker. You can't do anything to me, you are just a wannabe. I will turn this beat into something powerful.
People around the world call me Bhagavan. You should learn my name. I can take a life in an instant, call me Bhagavan.
I am bloodthirsty and focused. My weapon is ready, and I am on the move. Anyone looking for trouble should be careful because my crew is getting rowdy.
I don't care who you are with, I will take them all out. I am the boss here, so stop messing around.
Before my weapon fires, I will make a mess. I wear shades and act tough, and I will make you regret crossing me.
I am a gangster, and you know it. I take out everyone except the banker. You can't do anything to me, you are just a wannabe. I will turn this beat into something powerful.
People around the world call me Bhagavan. You should learn my name. I can take a life in an instant, call me Bhagavan.
